Welcome to Beauty of Healesville Suite 4! You can expect one of the most beautiful mountain views right beyond your window and all the Healesville attractions within close proximity - the perfect escape from the hustle of daily life.

There're two rooms with two beds, a sitting area and a balcony. We hope to offer you a convenient stay, so the kitchenette is equipped with a coffee machine, fridge, kettle, toaster, plus complementary coffee, tea and milk! Microwave, airfyer're in the common room.

One Bedroom Apartment includes a separate bedroom with a king bed or two single beds and a built-in robe with lots of storage space. The fully-equipped open-plan kitchen has everything you need, with fridge/freezer, oven, stovetop, microwave and dishwasher. For added comfort, enjoy free WiFi, smart TV, individual air conditioning/heating, in-room laundry facilities as well as a Nespresso coffee machine and pods to help you recharge.

Welcome to Casa on Clyde, our beautiful 1870's period home in the heart of St Kilda.  Enjoy the light filled spaces, sitting in front of the cosy fireplace or star gazing via the skylights whilst lying in bed.  Walking distance to cafes, restaurants,  theatres, nightlife, Sunday markets, beaches and all the other eclectic attractions St Kilda is famous for.  Trams are located at the end of the street for easy access into any other pocket of Melbourne.

Step into the charm of Carlton living with this modern 1BR apartment. Homey and inviting, it offers a delightful balcony to savour the neighbourhood's ambiance.

Located within walking distance of the vibrant Queen Victoria Market and the prestigious UniMelb, it seamlessly connects you to both culture and convenience. With the CBD just a stone's throw away, you'll enjoy the perfect balance of urban energy and cozy serenity in this Carlton gem.

2 bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms, an office space with NBN connectivity and 75" Smart TV. Beautiful kitchen with new Smeg appliances, Icon dining table for 6 people.
Two luxury couches in lounge area.
The Townhouse is over three floors, with roof top terrace complete with dining table and sun loungers.

In coveted South Melbourne, this stylish apartment blends modern interiors with a sought-after address bounded by shopping and dining. You’ll be footsteps from the neighbourhood’s award-winning restaurants and popular cafes that line Chapel Street.

Enjoy breathtaking city views from this luxury high-rise apartment, perfectly located in the heart of Melbourne CBD. This modern designer home offers a rare combination of elegance, comfort, and unbeatable convenience – just steps away from Melbourne Central, with supermarkets downstairs and restaurants all around.

Located on a high floor, the apartment features floor-to-ceiling windows with panoramic views, 2 stylish bedrooms, 2 modern bathrooms, and a cozy living area. Sleep soundly on hotel-

***Please note that our property is set up for families and groups of couples. If you are a group of singles please message us prior to booking and we will consider the circumstances***

A beautiful, open plan apartment in amazing location. Located right next to the Marriot with easy access to shops. It's inside the Free Tram zone, so getting around couldn't be easier!

A rare find in the CBD with 3 Queen Beds and an additional Queen Air mattress on request.

Parking available at $15 per day

Tranquil 3-bedroom haven near Melbourne Airport. European-inspired design with cozy charm. Nestled beside nature reserve with river and trails. Fully equipped kitchen, spacious lounge, and smart TV. Master bedroom with ensuite, two additional bedrooms. Modern bathroom with eco-friendly amenities. Outdoor patio with BBQ. Perfect for exploring Melbourne's vibrant scene or day trips to Great Ocean Road. Easy access to public transport and major roadways.

Cute Fitzroy cottage (back half) with a large studio living room / bedroom, full size kitchen, bathroom and garden. Located in the heart of Fitzroy (close to restaurants and bars) but quiet overnight. A real taste of Fitzroy living and lifestyle - retro bikes provided for use, as are pool towels if you want to go for a swim at the Fitzroy pool. And just 10-12mins to the city on the tram.

Book with confidence - if you need to cancel a full refund is provided up to 24 hours prior to check in.

Large bedroom with Queensize bed and private bathroom. The option to make use of the large kitchen facilities as well as shared living room.

Close to CBD, less than 30 minute walk and 10 minutes by public transport.

Located close to Errol Street which has a variaty of charming cafes, restaurants and grocery stores.

In beautiful Elwood by the bay.
Enjoy our spacious home.. whilst we are away. Morning coffee in the backyard, dusk vino's on the front verandah. Take a walk to the Botanical Gardens for a picnic, Elwood Beach for a swim. We ask please that you feed our 2 cats, Oli and Sophie and cuddle them. 😀

This private one bedroom apartment is suberbly located to explore Melbourne's sites and enjoy our vibrant food, art, culture and sporting scene. Walking distance to Albert Park Lake, South Melbourne market, and tram lines 1, 12 and 96 to connect you to Crown, Marvel Stadium, CBD, MCG and St Kilda. The apartment is equipped with an outdoor balcony with BBQ, TV, WIFI, full kitchen with gas cooking, air con and a washing machine. Whether you are here for work or play, Melbourne is at your doorstep!

Gorgeous modern open-plan studio in heart of Carlisle st. Trains, trams & a multitude of eateries make this place an absolute must-stay for those wanting to be in the heart of St Kilda. Clean, bright & over-sized set in a quiet & secure setting.

Pudding’s Home presents this spacious 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom residence featuring a chic Nordic-inspired, minimalist design. Enjoy modern living with a generous balcony offering stunning city views, plus a dedicated workspace perfect for remote work or creative projects. A free parking space is included, and you’ll have access to a fully-equipped gym, refreshing swimming pool, and stylish BBQ area. With two supermarkets and a café just downstairs, everything you need is right at your doorstep.

4 bedroom home in Toorak
Pool and outdoor entertaining area.
2km from Australian Open Tennis Centre
150m from Yarra River
Close to parks
Family friendly
Best location in Melbourne TOORAK

New family-friendly home situated in the heart of Weir Views, perfect to explore City of Melton & surrounds. Instantly shift into the comfort, relax and quality of this brand-new contemporary home. It features an open-plan layout, with a fresh and natural colour scheme with tasteful décor. It is equipped with all essential items and kitchen equipment for short or long term stays. Enjoy a short stroll to Opalia Plaza or scenic drives to Cobbledick's Ford Reserve and Eynesbury Golf Course.

~ Welcome to Flaneur ~
Translated from the French to a person who strolls the city in order to experience it.

A space to catch your breath & rest the soles of your feet from walking the vibrant city streets below. From the hustle of Chapel Street to the tiny streets of Greville & Gratton you will want to return to experience it again, and again, and again.

Modern apartment: perfectly located only 100m to the beach, railway station & Hampton St. Well known shopping strip - home to trendy cafes, restaurants & boutiques.
Apartment situated on quiet street containing modern appliances, 55" Samsung smart tv, large outdoor entertainment area, modern bathroom and undercover car space.
Enjoy your stay.

Welcome to our charming historic cottage, where old-world allure meets modern convenience. Nestled in a prime location, our cozy retreat offers easy access to South Melbourne Market, the CBD, Albert Park Lake and public transport.
Step inside and be enchanted by the timeless character. While the kitchen and bathroom are simple, they are fully functional, ensuring a comfortable stay. The inviting living space exudes warmth, making it the perfect place to unwind after a day of exploring the city.

Set in a quiet neighbourhood, Apple House offers short stay accommodation in Tarneit. Free unlimited WiFi is offered throughout the property and free private parking is available on site.

This property is also rated for the best value in Tarneit! Guests are getting more for their money when compared to other properties in this city.

Apple House has been welcoming guests since 11 Apr 2015

Fully contained retro one bedroom guest house with ensuite, lounge, kitchenette, laundry, electric heater, Wi-Fi. Private and quiet, with its own entry. Outside undercover patio with BBQ. Off street undercover parking. Close to Karingal Hub shopping centre, Peninsula Private Hospital, walking and bike tracks. Located 4.5km from Frankston Hospital, Monash University, Chisholm and the beach. Peninsula Kingswood Country Gold Club and Sandhurst near by. Easy access to Peninsula Freeway.

The beautiful sun filled light flows through the modern, Japanese style apartment. Adjoining The living space is the designer kitchen which has stone bench-tops, modern appliances including gas cooktop, fridge, toast over, microwave, and feature open shelves.

My place is good for couples, solo adventurers, and business travellers. I welcome ALL with open arms. All religions, nationalities, genders.

Our home delivers the best of Melbourne.   Only 5km from the city, with great transport options to the Entertainment and Shopping precincts, this luxury, architectural home  (4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, pool) has been designed and built to an exacting standard by an architect for his family.

Enjoy a stylish experience at this centrally located & luxury apartment. Conveniently located next to Restaurants, Cafes, Fitness Gyms, Albert Park, Lake and St Kilda Beach.

+ Tram stop is just outside the building entrance.

Origionally 2 workers cottages back in the days when the entire  nieghbourhood was farmland, this unique home is comfortable, spacious and unique.

15min train to the CBD (Station 600m walk). Beach is 10min bike ride & ~15 min walk to StKilda Botanical Gardens. Amazing stay with disabled access at rear. Ground floor 1940's Art Deco fully renovated: 2 bed, 2 bath(2 person stone bathtub and 2xShower), 2 car (max length 4.5m). Wonderful spacious layout. 90cm oven, split system AirCon, hydronic heating, google TV, couch(pull-out bed(to sleep 6 people)), dining area has double doors for natural living.

Stylish Apartment in the Heart of Collingwood

Welcome to your home away from home! This beautifully designed apartment offers the perfect combination of modern comforts and vibrant city living.

Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture, lush parks, and captivating coastlines right at your doorstep in this lovely studio apartment in trendy St Kilda. Conveniently a short 6-min drive from the beach, discover bright interiors on the top floor for a peaceful and quiet environment. Adorned with modern appliances, stylish decor, and meticulous attention to detail. With shops, dining spots, and various attractions nearby, this charming home offers the perfect base for your seaside getaway.

My place is close to excellent shopping, great cafes and restaurants, public transport with easy access to Chapel Street, Armadale and the CBD. You’ll love its quiet yet convenient location, and modern, stylish and light-filled environment. My place is good for couples, solo adventurers, and business travellers.

Minimum 3 nights.

Gardenvale train station is only a 2 minute walk away. This home is quiet and tranquil, perfect for a single person travelling or for a couple wanting to enjoy the Bayside lifestyle. This apartment will tick all your boxes ! Enjoy and please respect this space.
Relax with the whole family at this peaceful place to stay.

It has direct access to two courtyards so there is lots of sunlight.
Visitors love the private entrance to the studio .

Gorgeous, spacious and private! This comfortable room in the heart of Northcote is just minutes from High Street and all its bars and eateries.

With a newly renovated private bathroom, this queen room is perfect for romantic getaways or travellers looking to catch a good night's sleep. It's also well connected by the Hurstbridge train line.

The room is luxurious and has all the essentials such as TV, Google Chromecast, toiletries, lockable door with key, tea and coffee, and the comfiest bed!

Perfectly positioned within a 10-minute walk of RMIT and Queen Victoria Market and a stone’s throw from Melbourne Central trains, this newly renovated stay boasts modern comfort in an exceptional location. Head downstairs to stroll Chinatown eateries and Emporium shopping and make use of city trams before returning to your sunlit retreat to cook up some market produce in the well-equipped kitchen, relax on the sofa with a movie, and enjoy panoramic views of the sparkling city skyline after dark.

Fantastic and clean apartment in the centre of South Yarra close to public transport, cafes, bars, restaurants, cinemas and boutiques. Shopping is actually on your doorstep as are the trams which can take you to Melbourne’s CBD just 6 minutes or to St Kilda beach. Melbourne’s famous Botanical Garden is just 15 minute walk away. With amenities such as pool, spa, gym, tennis court, sauna, steam room, BBQ and secure garden/picnic area within your building you will never be short of things to do.

Located across from acres of parkland and with every amenity you could ask for only minutes away, this small but well appointed studio apartment allows you to enjoy everything Brunswick has to offer.
The studio is clean and bright and includes double bed, heating and cooling, kitchenette , washing machine, TV, WiFi, cute balcony and free undercover parking space. Trams and trains to the city and beyond are a short walk as is Sydney Road with it's incredible day and night life.

Welcome to our private and stylish guesthouse, conveniently located walking distance to vibrant High Street as well as amenities like All Nations Park and  Northcote Aquatic Centre. Enjoy privacy and independence with entrance via side gate, a queen bed, ensuite, fully equipped kitchen, and spacious living areas. Relax on your private patio or enjoy our large north-facing garden.  Excellent public transport connections make it easy to explore all that Melbourne has to offer.

This luxurious 3 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment (with secure undercover carpark) on the 24th floor in Southbank is modern, spacious and professionally furnished to a very high standard. It is centrally located to the Melbourne CBD, minutes from Melbourne’s dining, shopping and entertainment hubs. Breathtaking sweeping views in Southbank spanning the eastern Melbourne skyline to the southern seaside.

LOCATION! LOCATION! LOCATION! Right in the heart of Richmond, this fully renovated apartment is within walking distance of Bridge Road and Swan Street cafes, restaurants, grocery stores, night life, trams and endless shopping! And The MCG is only minutes walk away! The perfect base for lifestyle and exploring Cool inner City Richmond and beyond!

Amazing garden view apartment located in the Hip and Creative heart of Brunswick. So close to the Melbourne CBD (15 min Tram or train) and 25 min to Airport. Making it ideal for your visit.
The Hosts love to travel and really hope to bring comfort and joy to your visit too!
The apartment is high up with a huge garden, feeling the space and tranquil.
A world of cuisine and amenity just minutes away: 4 pines brewery, Market lane cafe, Woolworths, Aldi, train station, all within 50 metres.

Centrally located (5 min walk, 250ms) to shops, transport and the beach, this 90's style classic Chelsea freestanding 2 bedroom private unit villa with large courtyard is waiting to accompany your next break.

Newly installed fridge, flooring and bedding, large bathroom, seperate toilet, dining and seperate lounge area allows you space to enjoy the natural environs of the beach, parks, bike paths, shops and cafes. Seperate laundry space with washing machine and sink. Parking plentiful.

Centrally located in north-east Melbourne. A stone’s throw away from Burgundy Street coffee shops and Warringal Shopping Centre, 15 minute walk to The Austin Hospital, 28 minutes to Melbourne CBD, 15 minutes walk to Heidelberg train station.

This is a house share with myself so you will be sharing with myself. I usually work from home from my room between Monday to Friday 8 to 530PM from Monday to Friday.
Happy to share my space though and feel free to use it as your own x

Fully furnished bedroom in recently renovated home. Live with 2 friendly and busy female housemates (both aged 23). Walking distance to vibrant Smith and Brunswick streets and 10min drive to the city. Loads of shops, cafes and bars on your doorstep!

This cosy cottage is thoughtfully renovated to create an inviting and peaceful place for the family to stay. Surrounded in nature with views over the mountains and a  2 minute drive (or a steepish walk!) to the river and Warburton’s cafes. Original wooden floorboards are brought back to life, (and the 1950s pink bath is a feature!). The house offers a queen sized bed as well as a king-single and single in three bedrooms.

Super spacious, clean & cosy!
Smart TV with bose system bar connected for the best sound while you watch the latest movies. This kitchen is well equipped too for your cooking needs.

Welcome to your charming urban retreat! Our cozy room offers a tranquil escape in the heart of Sunshine, boasting stunning park views and a peaceful atmosphere.  It provides a option for guests seeking comfort and serenity.

Recently refurbished, the B&B contains all the modern luxuries to ensure your stay is one you won't forget. the spacious self contained cottage is designed as a couples romantic getaway, the main room features a lush Queen size bed,crisp sheets, mohair rugs, lounge/sitting area and flat screen TV. The Kitchenette contains a microwave oven and refrigerator/freezer.  Indulge in the double spa after a day of touring the picturesque Yarra Valley.

Something for everyone - A location central to all the amazing Collingwood cafes, bars and shopping, close to the CBD, MCG and Fitzroy's Brunswick St. Our large, modern unit is very quiet. A relaxing place to return after enjoying vibrant Melbourne. Full kitchen, wifi, car space.

We do not provide car parking.
The Airbnb is Very close to tram, Toorak train station, 2 parks, shops including supermarket. Also serviced by supermarket delivery, Uber Eats and Uber Taxi.
You will be sharing the three bedroom apartment with up to two other Airbnb guests. You get your own bedroom and share the kitchen, the lounge, the bathroom, and the separate toilet,

Booking 3 separate and standalone near new houses sitting adjacently on the same block. Great for large groups of families, friends, or work crew. 7 double size beds and amenities to accommodate up to 14 guests. There are 3 separate living quarters to accommodate privacy for large groups. There is nothing like this in the area.

A modernist gem in the heart of Fitzroy, Cairo Flats was built in 1936. This weekend holiday retreat (available from Fri 4pm to Mon 6pm or potentially longer stays upon request) offers an opportunity to visit this iconic building, with its minimalist design & striking concrete cantilever staircase. During the week this one room space is a graphic design studio, that converts into a cosy, inner city oasis set up for a memorable stay. NB: No aircon or parking/please see ‘Other Notes’

A resort style, impeccably presented, luxuriously decked out apartment with views to die for.

This 2 bdrm apartment on the 17th floor boasts 2 bathrooms, distant views of Port Phillip Bay and the MCG. Within a few moments walk to the CBD and Southbank DFO, Crown Casino and South Melbourne markets, you have access to WI-FI and PARKING. Walk river front cafes and restaurants, convenience store, & public transport at your doorstep.

Gym, Pool and tennis court.

My place is only 20m to Lygon Street, with over 300 Restaurants and Cafes to choose from. You’ll love my place because of the location, its large size, and its proximity to the City, Melbourne University, RMIT University, St. Vincents & the Royal Melbourne Hospitals, and the neighbourhood. Melbourne's cafe culture started in Lygon Street, and with Brunetti's it is still the heart of it. My Place is great for couples, singles and for families looking for great food, central location & space.

[No cleaning fee]
Welcome to my lovely, art deco listed apartment in the centre of gorgeous Melbourne.

This is not a cookie cutter beige apartment but a unique character-filled flat with style - without being too personal. At a huge 75 square metres it feels spacious and elegant. It has a separate study space with closeable door, full kitchen and laundry facilities and lift access.
The integrated music system is Sonos and the WiFi is powerful.
I hope you'll enjoy staying in this gem.

Welcome to Tala, your chic escape in the heart of Elwood Village! This 2-bedroom gem oozes style with designer furniture, luxe finishes, and a one-of-a-kind mural by renowned artist Heesco. Soak up natural light in every room, unwind in comfort, and step out to the best of Melbourne—parks, beach, cafes, and shops just moments away. Perfect for creatives, beach lovers, or anyone craving something a little extra special.
Book your stay now and experience Elwood at its best!

Quick access to a wide array of iconic Melbourne landmarks! It provides direct shuttle service going to the airport and vice versa with Sky Bus stopping only a few blocks away.

Lois will be your home away! You will feel like you have arrived home & can breathe out with relief when you walk inside. 3 bed, 2 bath, house, fully fenced private oasis garden. Close to train, beach and shops. Easy kitchen, new laundry & appliances.
